title: FOOD AND DRUGS
doc_html:
CHAPTER 4.  FOOD AND DRUGS

PART I.  ADULTERATION, SUBSTITUTION, MISBRANDING,

OR FALSE ADVERTISING

§601.  Title

This Part may be cited as the "State Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Law."
doc_text:
CHAPTER 4.  FOOD AND DRUGS
PART I.  ADULTERATION, SUBSTITUTION, MISBRANDING,
OR FALSE ADVERTISING
§601.  Title
This Part may be cited as the "State Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Law."
